categories.name: Steel & Accessories
categories.description: CRST series steel railing accessories and systems.

products.name: CRST-09 Glass Talon Spigot
products.description: Glass Railing Talon Spigots. This glass panel railing system is made up of glass panels and talon spigot clamps. Side mount spigots attach to the side of each glass panel, while surface mount spigots attach to the floor.

products.name: Side Mounting Stud
products.description: TRA 61R and 61S is a side mounting stud balustrade used in staircases, balconies and terraces. It is the newest and safest system in railing with a touch of elegance and simplicity to your rich interiors.

categories.name: SS Steel PVD Powder Coating
categories.description: Modern and contemporary shades, from black PVD to gold, from copper to bronze, scratched, matt, glossy.

products.name: CR-PVD-01
products.description: Stainless Steel L Profile is a versatile and durable structural element designed for various applications in construction, manufacturing, and design. Known for its excellent corrosion resistance and strength, the L profile provides both aesthetic appeal and structural integrity. It is ideal for use in frames, supports, and edging, offering a modern, clean look with the durability of stainless steel.

products.name: CR-PVD-02
products.description: Modern and contemporary shades, from black PVD to gold, from copper to bronze, scratched, matt, glossy. The aesthetic properties of the PVD treatment are also indicated for precious elements such as jewelry, fashion accessory watches and furnishing to bring out the elegance and refinement of the treated product.

products.name: CR-PVD-03
products.description: It is used in hotels, restaurants, luxury interior & exterior decor, elevator door/cabinet, kitchen equipment, escalator, columns, pillars, cladding, facade, flooring, roof, ceiling, wall, hotel lobby etc. This range is ideally suited for exterior cladding, interior decoration and fabrication of furniture and fixtures.

categories.name: UPVC Window Door Glass Partition
categories.description: CR-UPVC series windows, doors and glass partitions.

products.name: CR-UPVC-01
products.description: The UPVC Office Partitions & Doors offer customizable, elegant workspace solutions with hinged doors, premium UPVC construction for durability, easy maintenance, sound insulation, thermal efficiency, and a secure multi-point locking system. Made in India with modular design, they ensure privacy, safety, aesthetic appeal, and flexible reconfiguration for modern offices and commercial spaces.

products.name: CR-UPVC-02
products.description: Toughened glass, the most common type for partitioning, undergoes heating to become 4-5 times stronger than annealed glass, breaking into small safe bits instead of sharp shards. Glass partitions are transparent, non-weight-bearing walls that divide open spaces affordably without construction, preserving natural light in homes, offices, education, and commercial buildings.

products.name: CR-UPVC-03
products.description: White UPVC window unit featuring a combination of hinged and fixed glass panes. The assembly includes a top-hinged window over a fixed panel on the left, and a larger side-hinged window with a handle on the right, all set within a single frame with a sill.

products.name: CR-UPVC-04
products.description: White UPVC fixed window featuring a classic rectangular design with eight glass panes divided by internal colonial grids. Crafted for both home and office use, it provides a cost-effective way to enhance natural light and views while offering thermal efficiency, noise reduction, and a low-maintenance, durable finish.

products.name: CR-UPVC-05
products.description: Premium UPVC window system offering excellent thermal insulation, weather resistance, and low maintenance for modern homes and offices.

products.name: CR-UPVC-06
products.description: White powder-coated aluminum casement window features a durable, rust-resistant frame designed for excellent ventilation and energy efficiency. Its multi-point locking system and triple EPDM sealing strips provide superior security, sound insulation, and thermal performance.
